name: node
description: Node/npm projects: web apps, libraries, CLIs. Syncs package.json plus VERSION.

ui.integration_note: Import version from package.json at build time. Vite, Next.js, Remix, and Astro all support this via JSON imports or env vars. For runtime reads (serverless, long-running processes), serve the VERSION file from a /version endpoint.

snippets.vite: import pkg from '../package.json'; export const APP_VERSION = pkg.version;
snippets.cli: import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; const { version } = JSON.parse(readFileSync(new URL('../package.json', import.meta.url), 'utf8'));
